physical_source: Output of Agisoft Metashape "Generate Report" workflow after processing complete
how_to_obtain: Operator generates report in Agisoft Metashape Pro after processing. Required input — processing_score = null without it.
notes: REQUIRED. Parser keys off section headers (Survey Data / Camera Calibration / Camera Locations / Ground Control Points / Digital Elevation Model / Processing Parameters) not page numbers. Agisoft version drift handled by header-based parsing.

physical_source: Filled by operator at survey upload
how_to_obtain: Operator declares: project required CRS, accuracy target, expected precalibration, declared camera model, declared marker roles (which markers were intended as GCPs vs CPs), declared site cover, declared deliverable types, declared software version.
notes: Cross-source comparison artifact. Manifest is operator-declarative; report is software-generated. Mismatches between them reveal errors.

how_to_obtain: Operator uploads deliverable files alongside the processing report. Used for per-deliverable views in v1.1 + CRS metadata cross-checks.
notes: v1.0 reads minimal data (CRS metadata, file presence). v1.1 per-deliverable views read deeper. When deliverable file absent → DO7 flag fires + per-deliverable view returns null.

file_extensions: Reads from pre-processing GCP coord file + pre_processing manifest
physical_source: Already in CBMI system from upstream chain
how_to_obtain: CBMI internal — pre_processing chain outputs are available for cross-source comparison.
notes: Used ONLY for cross-source comparison (CV5 GCP typo check, CV4 role consistency check, DO3 internal transform check). NOT a runtime dependency on pre_processing_score — reads pre_processing source artifacts/manifest, not its computed score.
